title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: You've become stronger in the passing years.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Though, the same applies to me!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Like always, you cherish your afro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If we happen to meet again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WaH! Stop! Leave the Afro alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I'll protect at least this vestige alone!
